videos.title: Nürnberg get ahead Saarbrücken in penalties

videos.headline: Cologne stun Union Berlin to gain crucial points in relegation battle
videos.title: Cologne stun Union Berlin to gain crucial points in relegation battle
videos.caption: FC Cologne come back to beat Union Berlin 3-2 despite going two goals down within the opening 20 minutes.
videos.description: FC Cologne come back to beat Union Berlin 3-2 despite going two goals down within the opening 20 minutes.

videos.headline: Union Berlin scores first Bundesliga goal in over a month to draw with Augsburg
videos.title: Union Berlin scores first Bundesliga goal in over a month to draw with Augsburg
videos.caption: A goal from Kevin Volland helped Union Berlin to a 1-1 draw with Augsburg, scoring the club's first Bundesliga goal since Oct 7.

videos.headline: Werder Bremen condemn Union Berlin to 10th-straight loss
videos.title: Werder Bremen condemn Union Berlin to 10th-straight loss
videos.caption: Union Berlin fall to a 10th loss in a row in all competitions with a 2-0 defeat away at Werder Bremen.
